ZakatCalculation.title: ZakatCalculation
ZakatCalculation.description: Stores a historical record of a user's Zakat calculation based on various assets, allowing users to track their past calculations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ZakatCalculation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed this calculation. (Relationship: User 1:N ZakatCalculation)

calculationDate.description: The date and time when the Zakat calculation was performed.

cashAmount.description: The total cash amount entered by the user for the calculation.

goldValue.description: The total value of gold assets entered by the user for the calculation.

savingsAmount.description: The total savings amount entered by the user for the calculation.

businessAssetsAmount.description: The total value of business assets entered by the user for the calculation.

calculatedZakat.description: The final calculated Zakat amount based on the provided inputs.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments added by the user regarding this specific Zakat calculation.

EidGreeting.title: EidGreeting
EidGreeting.description: Represents a personalized Eid greeting generated by a user, including the recipient's name, chosen template, and a link to the generated image.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EidGreeting entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who generated this greeting. (Relationship: User 1:N EidGreeting)

recipientName.description: The name of the person for whom the Eid greeting was generated.

templateId.description: Identifier or name of the chosen template used for generating the greeting.

generatedImageUrl.description: The URL to the image file of the generated Eid Mubarak card.

generationDate.description: The date and time when this Eid greeting was generated.

SalamiEntry.title: SalamiEntry
SalamiEntry.description: Records an individual 'salami' (monetary gift) transaction, typically tracking amounts received by a user from a specific person, for the Salami Tracker feature.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalamiEntry entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this salami entry. (Relationship: User 1:N SalamiEntry)

personName.description: The name of the person from whom the salami was received.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the salami received. A positive value indicates money received.

entryDate.description: The date and time when this salami entry was recorded.

notes.description: Optional notes or context for this specific salami entry.

definition.description: Base collection for storing user profiles. This serves as the root for all user-specific data and facilitates path-based security rules. Includes basic user profile information.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Stores historical Zakat calculations specific to a user. Each document includes the `userId` for direct authorization. This structure ensures Authorization Independence and supports QAPs for user-specific listing.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed this Zakat calculation.

params.name: zakatCalculationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Zakat calculation.

definition.description: Stores personalized Eid greetings generated by a user. Each document includes the `userId` for direct authorization. This structure ensures Authorization Independence and supports QAPs for user-specific listing.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who generated this Eid greeting.

params.name: eidGreetingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Eid greeting.

definition.description: Records individual 'salami' (monetary gift) transactions for a specific user. Each document includes the `userId` for direct authorization. This structure ensures Authorization Independence and supports QAPs for user-specific listing.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this salami entry.

params.name: salamiEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific salami entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure for EidSpark strictly adheres to the core design principles, especially Authorization Independence, by implementing a hierarchical, user-owned data model. All personalized user data—Zakat calculations, Eid greetings, and Salami entries—are stored within subcollections under a user's specific document, following the pattern `/users/{userId}/{collectionName}/{documentId}`.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This structure ensures authorization independence by denormalizing the `userId` directly into the Firestore document path. For example, a `ZakatCalculation` document will reside at `/users/{userId}/zakatCalculations/{zakatCalculationId}`. Firebase Security Rules can then directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` wildcard in the path and also the `userId` field within the document itself. This eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls to a parent document or user profile to determine ownership, thereby supporting atomic writes and making rules simple, robust, and easily debuggable. Each document explicitly contains its `userId` field, reinforcing this ownership.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** This structure inherently supports Query-Ability and Predictable Security (QAPs) for `list` operations. Because all sensitive user data is scoped under `/users/{userId}/...`, a user can only perform `list` (or `get`) operations on their own data. For instance, a query for `zakatCalculations` would always start at `/users/{request.auth.uid}/zakatCalculations`, effectively 'filtering' by the authenticated user's ID at the collection level. This ensures that a `list` operation will only return documents the user is authorized to see, without relying on client-side filtering or inefficient database-level filtering after fetching data, maintaining performance and security.
